mapper.insert: INSERT INTO articles (title, content, category, author, cover_image, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{author}, #{coverImage}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE articles SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, author = #{author}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles
AND category = #{category}
